_doc: Per-test budgets + tiers. Policy: docs/stewardship/testing.md. Maintained by `bun run test:audit`. budgetMs=lean target wall time; tier=smoke|fast|slow|network for modular/locality runs.

lastAudit.result: first audit. history p95/flaky POISONED by 3 broken-binary mass-fail runs (every test hung to timeout); healthy wall p50=27.2s. ~80s of fixed-sleep dead time convertible to await-true (darkmode/contrast dominate). genuinely flaky: horizontal-fold-hotkeys, groups #11/#12b.
